user.title: Home location
user.description: Set your home coordinates and search radius for nearby Costco and Sam's Club fuel stations.

discover.title: Select stations
discover.description: Choose nearby stations found within your radius ({count} found), or paste fuel-center URLs (one per line).

add_station.title: Add station
add_station.description: Paste a Costco warehouse URL, Sam's fuel-center URL, or an ID like costco:332 or sams:6677.

configure_users.title: Household drivers
configure_users.description: Assign Home Assistant users, their vehicle MPG, and fuel grade. These settings apply to trip cost sensors for all stations.

refresh.name: Refresh
refresh.description: Refresh all Club Gas station data immediately.
